response:
Subject: Farewell and Thank You

Dear Team,

I wanted to reach out and say goodbye as I embark on my next journey. It's been an incredible experience working alongside such talented and supportive individuals, and I will cherish the memories and lessons shared. I am truly grateful for the opportunities and the friendships formed here, and I look forward to staying in touch.

Wishing you all the best in your future endeavors.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
